svg.title: Nginx HTTP caching setup
svg.desc: A client sends requests to nginx, which checks its local cache. On a cache hit the response is served immediately. On a cache miss nginx forwards the request to the backend server, caches the response, then returns it to the client.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the client interact with an HTTP cache?')
sendPrompt('How does nginx handle HTTP caching?')
sendPrompt('How does nginx store and expire cached content?')
sendPrompt('When does the backend server get involved in a cached setup?')

svg.text: ETag / If-None-Match — validate if cached content is still fresh
Expires — absolute timestamp for cache expiry
